benefits.description: Saw changes in skin in a week with previous batch in 2022

side_effects.description: Flushing occurred with previous batch at 100mcg dose, used as indicator of efficacy
Stomach growling about an hour after injection at 600mcg dose

protocol_notes: Current batch: 8mg total ipamorelin+CJC-1295 (100mg of each stated in comment clarification, likely mcg intended based on context). Previous experience in 2022: 100mcg daily for 2 months from different supplier with positive results. Current batch from unreliable supplier with no Janoshik COA report; previous batch from same supplier was effective. Reports possible degradation or purity issues with current batch. Fasting: 3 hours after morning injection, 4 hours before night injection. Not mixing injections in same syringe. Escalated dose from 100mcg to 600mcg after 3 weeks of no perceived effects on current batch.
